ARTT330 Elements of Sculpture: Metal Casting (3 Credits)

Sculptural concepts and fundamental processes related to metal casting. Prerequisite: ARTT200, ARTT210, and ARTT150; or permission of ARHU- Art department.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

50 ARTT - Art Studio

ARTT331 Elements of Sculpture: Steel (3 Credits)

Sculptural concepts and fundamental processes related to steel fabrication; torch cutting, welding, hot forging, and finishing. Prerequisite: ARTT200, ARTT210, and ARTT150; or permission of ARHU- Art department.

ARTT333 Elements of Sculpture: Wood and Mixed Media (3 Credits) Sculptural concepts and fundamental processes using wood and mixed media.
